DOCKERFILE:
  FROM ubuntu:22.04
  ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
  ENV LANG=C.UTF-8
  ENV LC_ALL=C.UTF-8
  ENV TZ=Etc/UTC
  RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
      build-essential \
      gcc-10 g++-10 \
      clang-12 \
      cmake \
      git \
      curl \
      ca-certificates \
      python3 python3-pip \
      pkg-config \
      libssl-dev \
      && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
  # Set gcc and g++ to version 10 explicitly
  RUN update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/gcc gcc /usr/bin/gcc-10 100 \
   && update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/g++ g++ /usr/bin/g++-10 100
  # Install Rust (stable) via rustup
  RUN curl https://sh.rustup.rs -sSf | sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain stable
  ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"
  # Create working directory
  WORKDIR /app
  # Clone the plonky2-gpu repository and dependencies
  # Assuming the main repo is plonky2-gpu, and dependencies are submodules or separate repos
  # For this Dockerfile, clone plonky2-gpu repo only; user can add other clones as needed
  RUN git clone https://github.com/scroll-tech/plonky2-gpu.git . \
   && git submodule update --init --recursive
  # Build Rust workspace members with release profile (opt-level=3)
  RUN cargo build --release
  # Build C++ components via CMake (CPU-only, no CUDA)
  RUN mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release && cmake --build . -- -j$(nproc)
  # Set working directory to repo root and default command to bash shell
  WORKDIR /app
  CMD ["/bin/bash"]

DOCKERFILE:
  FROM ubuntu:22.04
  ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
  ENV LANG=C.UTF-8
  ENV LC_ALL=C.UTF-8
  ENV TZ=Etc/UTC
  RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
      build-essential \
      gcc-10 g++-10 \
      clang-12 \
      cmake \
      git \
      curl \
      ca-certificates \
      python3 python3-pip \
      pkg-config \
      libssl-dev \
      && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
  # Set gcc and g++ to version 10 explicitly
  RUN update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/gcc gcc /usr/bin/gcc-10 100 \
   && update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/g++ g++ /usr/bin/g++-10 100
  # Install Rust (stable) via rustup
  RUN curl https://sh.rustup.rs -sSf | sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain stable
  ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"
  # Create working directory
  WORKDIR /app
  # Copy the repository contents into the container
  COPY . /app
  # Initialize and update git submodules
  RUN git submodule update --init --recursive
  # Build Rust workspace members with release profile (opt-level=3)
  RUN cargo build --release
  # Build C++ components via CMake (CPU-only, no CUDA)
  RUN mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release && cmake --build . -- -j$(nproc)
  # Set working directory to repo root and default command to bash shell
  WORKDIR /app
  CMD ["/bin/bash"]

DOCKERFILE:
  FROM ubuntu:22.04
  ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
  ENV LANG=C.UTF-8
  ENV LC_ALL=C.UTF-8
  ENV TZ=Etc/UTC
  RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
      build-essential \
      gcc-10 g++-10 \
      clang-12 \
      cmake \
      git \
      curl \
      ca-certificates \
      python3 python3-pip \
      pkg-config \
      libssl-dev \
      && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
  # Set gcc and g++ to version 10 explicitly
  RUN update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/gcc gcc /usr/bin/gcc-10 100 \
   && update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/g++ g++ /usr/bin/g++-10 100
  # Install Rust (stable) via rustup
  RUN curl https://sh.rustup.rs -sSf | sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain stable
  ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"
  # Create working directory
  WORKDIR /app
  # Copy the repository contents into the container
  COPY . /app
  # Initialize and update git submodules
  RUN git submodule update --init --recursive
  # Fetch Rust dependencies separately to improve caching and detect issues early
  RUN cargo fetch
  # Build Rust workspace members with verbose output for better diagnostics
  RUN cargo build --release --verbose
  # Build C++ components via CMake (CPU-only, no CUDA)
  RUN mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release && cmake --build . -- -j$(nproc)
  # Set working directory to repo root and default command to bash shell
  WORKDIR /app
  CMD ["/bin/bash"]

DOCKERFILE:
  FROM ubuntu:22.04
  ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
  ENV LANG=C.UTF-8
  ENV LC_ALL=C.UTF-8
  ENV TZ=Etc/UTC
  RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
      build-essential \
      gcc-10 g++-10 \
      clang-12 \
      cmake \
      git \
      curl \
      ca-certificates \
      python3 python3-pip \
      pkg-config \
      libssl-dev \
      && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
  # Set gcc and g++ to version 10 explicitly
  RUN update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/gcc gcc /usr/bin/gcc-10 100 \
   && update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/g++ g++ /usr/bin/g++-10 100
  # Install Rust (stable) via rustup
  RUN curl https://sh.rustup.rs -sSf | sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain stable
  ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"
  # Verify Rust installation and toolchain
  RUN rustc --version && cargo --version
  # Create working directory
  WORKDIR /app
  # Copy the repository contents into the container
  COPY . /app
  # Initialize and update git submodules
  RUN git submodule update --init --recursive
  # Fetch Rust dependencies separately to improve caching and detect issues early
  RUN cargo fetch
  # Build Rust workspace members with verbose output for better diagnostics
  RUN cargo build --release --verbose
  # Build C++ components via CMake (CPU-only, no CUDA)
  RUN mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release && cmake --build . -- -j$(nproc)
  # Set working directory to repo root and default command to bash shell
  WORKDIR /app
  CMD ["/bin/bash"]

DOCKERFILE:
  FROM ubuntu:22.04
  ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
  ENV LANG=C.UTF-8
  ENV LC_ALL=C.UTF-8
  ENV TZ=Etc/UTC
  RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
      build-essential \
      gcc-10 g++-10 \
      clang-12 \
      cmake \
      git \
      curl \
      ca-certificates \
      python3 python3-pip \
      pkg-config \
      libssl-dev \
      && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
  # Set gcc and g++ to version 10 explicitly
  RUN update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/gcc gcc /usr/bin/gcc-10 100 \
   && update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/g++ g++ /usr/bin/g++-10 100
  # Install Rust (stable) via rustup
  RUN curl https://sh.rustup.rs -sSf | sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain stable
  ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"
  # Verify Rust installation and toolchain
  RUN rustc --version && cargo --version
  # Create working directory
  WORKDIR /app
  # Copy the repository contents into the container
  COPY . /app
  # Initialize and update git submodules
  RUN git submodule update --init --recursive
  # Set environment variables to disable CUDA features in Rust build
  ENV RUSTFLAGS="-C target-feature=-cuda"
  # Fetch Rust dependencies separately to improve caching and detect issues early
  RUN cargo fetch
  # Build Rust workspace members with verbose output for better diagnostics
  RUN cargo build --release --verbose
  # Build C++ components via CMake (CPU-only, no CUDA)
  RUN mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release && cmake --build . -- -j$(nproc)
  # Set working directory to repo root and default command to bash shell
  WORKDIR /app
  CMD ["/bin/bash"]

DOCKERFILE:
  FROM ubuntu:22.04
  ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
  ENV LANG=C.UTF-8
  ENV LC_ALL=C.UTF-8
  ENV TZ=Etc/UTC
  RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
      build-essential \
      gcc-10 g++-10 \
      clang-12 \
      cmake \
      git \
      curl \
      ca-certificates \
      python3 python3-pip \
      pkg-config \
      libssl-dev \
      && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
  # Set gcc and g++ to version 10 explicitly
  RUN update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/gcc gcc /usr/bin/gcc-10 100 \
   && update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/g++ g++ /usr/bin/g++-10 100
  # Install Rust (stable) via rustup
  RUN curl https://sh.rustup.rs -sSf | sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain stable
  ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"
  # Verify Rust installation and toolchain
  RUN rustc --version && cargo --version
  # Create working directory
  WORKDIR /app
  # Copy the repository contents into the container
  COPY . /app
  # Initialize and update git submodules
  RUN git submodule update --init --recursive
  # Fetch Rust dependencies separately to improve caching and detect issues early
  RUN cargo fetch
  # Build Rust workspace members with verbose output for better diagnostics
  RUN cargo build --release --verbose
  # Build C++ components via CMake (CPU-only, no CUDA)
  RUN mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release && cmake --build . -- -j$(nproc)
  # Set working directory to repo root and default command to bash shell
  WORKDIR /app
  CMD ["/bin/bash"]

DOCKERFILE:
  FROM ubuntu:22.04
  ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
  ENV LANG=C.UTF-8
  ENV LC_ALL=C.UTF-8
  ENV TZ=Etc/UTC
  RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
      build-essential \
      gcc-10 g++-10 \
      clang-12 \
      cmake \
      git \
      curl \
      ca-certificates \
      python3 python3-pip \
      pkg-config \
      libssl-dev \
      && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
  # Set gcc and g++ to version 10 explicitly
  RUN update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/gcc gcc /usr/bin/gcc-10 100 \
   && update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/g++ g++ /usr/bin/g++-10 100
  # Install Rust (stable) via rustup
  RUN curl https://sh.rustup.rs -sSf | sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain stable
  ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"
  # Verify Rust installation and toolchain
  RUN rustc --version && cargo --version
  # Create working directory
  WORKDIR /app
  # Copy the repository contents into the container
  COPY . /app
  # Initialize and update git submodules
  RUN git submodule update --init --recursive
  # Fetch Rust dependencies separately to improve caching and detect issues early
  RUN cargo fetch
  # Build only the main workspace members excluding CUDA-related crates
  RUN cargo build --release --verbose --exclude cuda
  # Build C++ components via CMake (CPU-only, no CUDA)
  RUN mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release && cmake --build . -- -j$(nproc)
  # Set working directory to repo root and default command to bash shell
  WORKDIR /app
  CMD ["/bin/bash"]

DOCKERFILE:
  FROM ubuntu:22.04
  ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
  ENV LANG=C.UTF-8
  ENV LC_ALL=C.UTF-8
  ENV TZ=Etc/UTC
  RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
      build-essential \
      gcc-10 g++-10 \
      clang-12 \
      cmake \
      git \
      curl \
      ca-certificates \
      python3 python3-pip \
      pkg-config \
      libssl-dev \
      && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
  # Set gcc and g++ to version 10 explicitly
  RUN update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/gcc gcc /usr/bin/gcc-10 100 \
   && update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/g++ g++ /usr/bin/g++-10 100
  # Install Rust (stable) via rustup
  RUN curl https://sh.rustup.rs -sSf | sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain stable
  ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"
  # Verify Rust installation and toolchain
  RUN rustc --version && cargo --version
  # Create working directory
  WORKDIR /app
  # Copy the repository contents into the container
  COPY . /app
  # Initialize and update git submodules
  RUN git submodule update --init --recursive
  # Fetch Rust dependencies separately to improve caching and detect issues early
  RUN cargo fetch
  # Build all Rust workspace members (including CUDA crate if present)
  RUN cargo build --release --verbose
  # Build C++ components via CMake (CPU-only, no CUDA)
  RUN mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release && cmake --build . -- -j$(nproc)
  # Set working directory to repo root and default command to bash shell
  WORKDIR /app
  CMD ["/bin/bash"]

DOCKERFILE:
  FROM ubuntu:22.04
  ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
  ENV LANG=C.UTF-8
  ENV LC_ALL=C.UTF-8
  ENV TZ=Etc/UTC
  RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
      build-essential \
      gcc-10 g++-10 \
      clang-12 \
      cmake \
      git \
      curl \
      ca-certificates \
      python3 python3-pip \
      pkg-config \
      libssl-dev \
      && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
  # Set gcc and g++ to version 10 explicitly
  RUN update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/gcc gcc /usr/bin/gcc-10 100 \
   && update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/g++ g++ /usr/bin/g++-10 100
  # Install Rust (stable) via rustup
  RUN curl https://sh.rustup.rs -sSf | sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain stable
  ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"
  # Verify Rust installation and toolchain
  RUN rustc --version && cargo --version
  # Create working directory
  WORKDIR /app
  # Copy the repository contents into the container
  COPY . /app
  # Initialize and update git submodules
  RUN git submodule update --init --recursive
  # Fetch Rust dependencies separately to improve caching and detect issues early
  RUN cargo fetch
  # Build Rust workspace excluding CUDA crate by disabling the "cuda" feature if it exists
  # Assuming the CUDA crate is conditionally compiled with a feature named "cuda"
  RUN cargo build --release --verbose --exclude cuda || cargo build --release --verbose
  # Build C++ components via CMake (CPU-only, no CUDA)
  RUN mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release && cmake --build . -- -j$(nproc)
  # Set working directory to repo root and default command to bash shell
  WORKDIR /app
  CMD ["/bin/bash"]

DOCKERFILE:
  FROM ubuntu:22.04
  ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
  ENV LANG=C.UTF-8
  ENV LC_ALL=C.UTF-8
  ENV TZ=Etc/UTC
  RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
      build-essential \
      gcc-10 g++-10 \
      clang-12 \
      cmake \
      git \
      curl \
      ca-certificates \
      python3 python3-pip \
      pkg-config \
      libssl-dev \
      && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
  # Set gcc and g++ to version 10 explicitly
  RUN update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/gcc gcc /usr/bin/gcc-10 100 \
   && update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/g++ g++ /usr/bin/g++-10 100
  # Install Rust (stable) via rustup
  RUN curl https://sh.rustup.rs -sSf | sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain stable
  ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"
  # Verify Rust installation and toolchain
  RUN rustc --version && cargo --version
  # Create working directory
  WORKDIR /app
  # Copy the repository contents into the container
  COPY . /app
  # Initialize and update git submodules
  RUN git submodule update --init --recursive
  # Fetch Rust dependencies separately to improve caching and detect issues early
  RUN cargo fetch
  # Build Rust workspace excluding CUDA crate by disabling the "cuda" feature
  RUN cargo build --release --verbose --no-default-features --features="default"
  # Build C++ components via CMake (CPU-only, no CUDA)
  RUN mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release && cmake --build . -- -j$(nproc)
  # Set working directory to repo root and default command to bash shell
  WORKDIR /app
  CMD ["/bin/bash"]

     - (No additional external downloads introduced by the new `.gitignore` file)

DOCKERFILE:
  FROM ubuntu:22.04
  ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
  ENV LANG=C.UTF-8
  ENV LC_ALL=C.UTF-8
  ENV TZ=Etc/UTC
  RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
      build-essential \
      gcc-10 g++-10 \
      clang-12 \
      cmake \
      git \
      curl \
      ca-certificates \
      python3 python3-pip \
      pkg-config \
      libssl-dev \
      && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
  # Set gcc and g++ to version 10 explicitly
  RUN update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/gcc gcc /usr/bin/gcc-10 100 \
   && update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/g++ g++ /usr/bin/g++-10 100
  # Install Rust (stable) via rustup
  RUN curl https://sh.rustup.rs -sSf | sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain stable
  ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"
  # Verify Rust installation and toolchain
  RUN rustc --version && cargo --version
  # Create working directory
  WORKDIR /app
  # Copy the repository contents into the container
  COPY . /app
  # Initialize and update git submodules
  RUN git submodule update --init --recursive
  # Fetch Rust dependencies separately to improve caching and detect issues early
  RUN cargo fetch
  # Build Rust workspace excluding the "cuda" crate by disabling default features and explicitly enabling "cpu" feature
  RUN cargo build --release --verbose --no-default-features --features="cpu"
  # Build C++ components via CMake (CPU-only, no CUDA)
  RUN mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release && cmake --build . -- -j$(nproc)
  # Set working directory to repo root and default command to bash shell
  WORKDIR /app
  CMD ["/bin/bash"]

DOCKERFILE:
  FROM ubuntu:22.04
  ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
  ENV LANG=C.UTF-8
  ENV LC_ALL=C.UTF-8
  ENV TZ=Etc/UTC
  RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
      build-essential \
      gcc-10 g++-10 \
      clang-12 \
      cmake \
      git \
      curl \
      ca-certificates \
      python3 python3-pip \
      pkg-config \
      libssl-dev \
      && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
  # Set gcc and g++ to version 10 explicitly
  RUN update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/gcc gcc /usr/bin/gcc-10 100 \
   && update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/g++ g++ /usr/bin/g++-10 100
  # Install Rust (stable) via rustup
  RUN curl https://sh.rustup.rs -sSf | sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain stable
  ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"
  # Verify Rust installation and toolchain
  RUN rustc --version && cargo --version
  # Create working directory
  WORKDIR /app
  # Copy the repository contents into the container
  COPY . /app
  # Initialize and update git submodules
  RUN git submodule update --init --recursive
  # Fetch Rust dependencies separately to improve caching and detect issues early
  RUN cargo fetch
  # Build Rust workspace with default features enabled (to include necessary crates)
  RUN cargo build --release --verbose
  # Build C++ components via CMake (CPU-only, no CUDA)
  RUN mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release && cmake --build . -- -j$(nproc)
  # Set working directory to repo root and default command to bash shell
  WORKDIR /app
  CMD ["/bin/bash"]

DOCKERFILE:
  FROM ubuntu:22.04
  ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
  ENV LANG=C.UTF-8
  ENV LC_ALL=C.UTF-8
  ENV TZ=Etc/UTC
  RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
      build-essential \
      gcc-10 g++-10 \
      clang-12 \
      cmake \
      git \
      curl \
      ca-certificates \
      python3 python3-pip \
      pkg-config \
      libssl-dev \
      libclang-dev \
      llvm-dev \
      && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
  # Set gcc and g++ to version 10 explicitly
  RUN update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/gcc gcc /usr/bin/gcc-10 100 \
   && update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/g++ g++ /usr/bin/g++-10 100
  # Install Rust (stable) via rustup
  RUN curl https://sh.rustup.rs -sSf | sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain stable
  ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"
  # Verify Rust installation and toolchain
  RUN rustc --version && cargo --version
  # Create working directory
  WORKDIR /app
  # Copy the repository contents into the container
  COPY . /app
  # Initialize and update git submodules
  RUN git submodule update --init --recursive
  # Fetch Rust dependencies separately to improve caching and detect issues early
  RUN cargo fetch
  # Build Rust workspace with verbose output and without default features to avoid GPU/CUDA dependencies
  RUN cargo build --release --verbose --no-default-features
  # Build C++ components via CMake (CPU-only, no CUDA)
  RUN mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DENABLE_CUDA=OFF && cmake --build . -- -j$(nproc)
  # Set working directory to repo root and default command to bash shell
  WORKDIR /app
  CMD ["/bin/bash"]

DOCKERFILE:
  FROM ubuntu:22.04
  ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
  ENV LANG=C.UTF-8
  ENV LC_ALL=C.UTF-8
  ENV TZ=Etc/UTC
  RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
      build-essential \
      gcc-10 g++-10 \
      clang-12 \
      cmake \
      git \
      curl \
      ca-certificates \
      python3 python3-pip \
      pkg-config \
      libssl-dev \
      libclang-dev \
      llvm-dev \
      && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
  # Set gcc and g++ to version 10 explicitly
  RUN update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/gcc gcc /usr/bin/gcc-10 100 \
   && update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/g++ g++ /usr/bin/g++-10 100
  # Install Rust (stable) via rustup
  RUN curl https://sh.rustup.rs -sSf | sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain stable
  ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"
  # Verify Rust installation and toolchain
  RUN rustc --version && cargo --version
  # Create working directory
  WORKDIR /app
  # Copy the repository contents into the container
  COPY . /app
  # Initialize and update git submodules
  RUN git submodule update --init --recursive
  # Fetch Rust dependencies separately to improve caching and detect issues early
  RUN cargo fetch
  # Run cargo check first to diagnose potential build issues
  RUN cargo check --verbose
  # Build Rust workspace with verbose output (without --no-default-features to allow required features)
  RUN cargo build --release --verbose
  # Build C++ components via CMake (CPU-only, no CUDA)
  RUN mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DENABLE_CUDA=OFF && cmake --build . -- -j$(nproc)
  # Set working directory to repo root and default command to bash shell
  WORKDIR /app
  CMD ["/bin/bash"]

DOCKERFILE:
  FROM ubuntu:22.04
  ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
  ENV LANG=C.UTF-8
  ENV LC_ALL=C.UTF-8
  ENV TZ=Etc/UTC
  RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
      build-essential \
      gcc-10 g++-10 \
      clang-12 \
      cmake \
      git \
      curl \
      ca-certificates \
      python3 python3-pip \
      pkg-config \
      libssl-dev \
      libclang-dev \
      llvm-dev \
      && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
  RUN update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/gcc gcc /usr/bin/gcc-10 100 \
   && update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/g++ g++ /usr/bin/g++-10 100
  RUN curl https://sh.rustup.rs -sSf | sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain stable
  ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"
  RUN rustc --version && cargo --version
  WORKDIR /app
  COPY . /app
  RUN git submodule update --init --recursive
  RUN rustup component add rustfmt clippy
  RUN cargo fetch
  RUN cargo check --all --verbose
  RUN cargo build --release --all --verbose
  RUN mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DENABLE_CUDA=OFF && cmake --build . -- -j$(nproc)
  WORKDIR /app
  CMD ["/bin/bash"]

DOCKERFILE:
  FROM ubuntu:22.04
  ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
  ENV LANG=C.UTF-8
  ENV LC_ALL=C.UTF-8
  ENV TZ=Etc/UTC
  RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
      build-essential \
      gcc-10 g++-10 \
      clang-12 \
      cmake \
      git \
      curl \
      ca-certificates \
      python3 python3-pip \
      pkg-config \
      libssl-dev \
      libclang-dev \
      llvm-dev \
      && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
  RUN update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/gcc gcc /usr/bin/gcc-10 100 \
   && update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/g++ g++ /usr/bin/g++-10 100
  RUN curl https://sh.rustup.rs -sSf | sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain stable
  ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"
  RUN rustc --version && cargo --version
  WORKDIR /app
  COPY . /app
  RUN git submodule update --init --recursive
  RUN rustup component add rustfmt clippy
  RUN cargo fetch --verbose
  RUN cargo check --workspace --verbose
  RUN cargo build --release --workspace --verbose
  RUN mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DENABLE_CUDA=OFF && cmake --build . -- -j$(nproc)
  WORKDIR /app
  CMD ["/bin/bash"]

DOCKERFILE:
  FROM ubuntu:22.04
  ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
  ENV LANG=C.UTF-8
  ENV LC_ALL=C.UTF-8
  ENV TZ=Etc/UTC
  RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
      build-essential \
      gcc-10 g++-10 \
      clang-12 \
      cmake \
      git \
      curl \
      ca-certificates \
      python3 python3-pip \
      pkg-config \
      libssl-dev \
      libclang-dev \
      llvm-dev \
      libelf-dev \
      libdw-dev \
      && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
  RUN update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/gcc gcc /usr/bin/gcc-10 100 \
   && update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/g++ g++ /usr/bin/g++-10 100
  RUN curl https://sh.rustup.rs -sSf | sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain stable
  ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"
  RUN rustc --version && cargo --version
  WORKDIR /app
  COPY . /app
  RUN git submodule update --init --recursive
  RUN rustup component add rustfmt clippy
  RUN cargo fetch --verbose
  RUN cargo check --workspace --verbose || (cat /app/cargo-check.log && false)
  RUN cargo build --release --workspace --verbose
  RUN mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DENABLE_CUDA=OFF && cmake --build . -- -j$(nproc)
  WORKDIR /app
  CMD ["/bin/bash"]

DOCKERFILE:
  FROM ubuntu:22.04
  ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
  ENV LANG=C.UTF-8
  ENV LC_ALL=C.UTF-8
  ENV TZ=Etc/UTC
  RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
      build-essential \
      gcc-10 g++-10 \
      clang-12 \
      cmake \
      git \
      curl \
      ca-certificates \
      python3 python3-pip \
      pkg-config \
      libssl-dev \
      libclang-dev \
      llvm-dev \
      libelf-dev \
      libdw-dev \
      && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
  RUN update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/gcc gcc /usr/bin/gcc-10 100 \
   && update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/g++ g++ /usr/bin/g++-10 100
  RUN curl https://sh.rustup.rs -sSf | sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain stable
  ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"
  RUN rustc --version && cargo --version
  WORKDIR /app
  COPY . /app
  RUN git submodule update --init --recursive
  RUN rustup component add rustfmt clippy
  RUN cargo fetch --verbose
  RUN cargo check --workspace --verbose || (echo "Cargo check failed, showing verbose output:" && cargo check --workspace --verbose)
  RUN cargo build --release --workspace --verbose
  RUN mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DENABLE_CUDA=OFF && cmake --build . -- -j$(nproc)
  WORKDIR /app
  CMD ["/bin/bash"]

DOCKERFILE:
  FROM ubuntu:22.04
  ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
  ENV LANG=C.UTF-8
  ENV LC_ALL=C.UTF-8
  ENV TZ=Etc/UTC
  RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
      build-essential \
      gcc-10 g++-10 \
      clang-12 \
      cmake \
      git \
      curl \
      ca-certificates \
      python3 python3-pip \
      pkg-config \
      libssl-dev \
      libclang-dev \
      llvm-dev \
      libelf-dev \
      libdw-dev \
      pkg-config \
      libcurl4-openssl-dev \
      libssl-dev \
      && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
  RUN update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/gcc gcc /usr/bin/gcc-10 100 \
   && update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/g++ g++ /usr/bin/g++-10 100
  RUN curl https://sh.rustup.rs -sSf | sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain stable
  ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"
  RUN rustc --version && cargo --version
  WORKDIR /app
  COPY . /app
  RUN git submodule update --init --recursive
  RUN rustup component add rustfmt clippy
  # Add the Rust toolchain targets that might be needed
  RUN rustup target add x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
  # Use cargo build with verbose output to catch errors early and to avoid cargo check failing separately
  RUN cargo build --release --workspace --verbose
  RUN mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DENABLE_CUDA=OFF && cmake --build . -- -j$(nproc)
  WORKDIR /app
  CMD ["/bin/bash"]

DOCKERFILE:
  FROM ubuntu:22.04
  ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
  ENV LANG=C.UTF-8
  ENV LC_ALL=C.UTF-8
  ENV TZ=Etc/UTC
  RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
      build-essential \
      gcc-10 g++-10 \
      clang-12 \
      cmake \
      git \
      curl \
      ca-certificates \
      python3 python3-pip \
      pkg-config \
      libssl-dev \
      libclang-dev \
      llvm-dev \
      libelf-dev \
      libdw-dev \
      libcurl4-openssl-dev \
      && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
  RUN update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/gcc gcc /usr/bin/gcc-10 100 \
   && update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/g++ g++ /usr/bin/g++-10 100
  RUN curl https://sh.rustup.rs -sSf | sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain stable
  ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"
  RUN rustc --version && cargo --version
  WORKDIR /app
  COPY . /app
  RUN git submodule update --init --recursive
  RUN rustup component add rustfmt clippy
  RUN rustup target add x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
  RUN cargo clean
  RUN cargo build --release --workspace --verbose
  RUN mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DENABLE_CUDA=OFF && cmake --build . -- -j$(nproc)
  WORKDIR /app
  CMD ["/bin/bash"]
